description: EXP-001 Living KnowledgeQube evaluation — collection, artifacts, and question bank (evaluation-protocol.md). Single source of truth shared by scripts/evaluate-exp001.mjs and services/experiments/exp001.ts.

questions.text: What comes first: a person or their identity? What follows from the ordering?
Can an artificial agent hold sovereignty?
If an agent misacts under delegation, who is accountable?
Can a citizen grant an agent permanent authority?
Can an agent expand its own permissions?
How is Standing earned, and what is it NOT?
If a citizen truthfully reports something that later causes harm, is their Standing forfeit?
Does a claim shared by millions become more true? Which dimension does sharing move?
Is a high-Standing statement necessarily true?
Who defines what words mean on this network, and what makes something canon?
What blockchain does the Constitutional Internet run on?
What fee or token is required to obtain Standing?
Which government or company governs the Constitutional Internet?
